channel.title: Mindsets on Hance Zhang's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Mindsets on Hance Zhang's Blog

item.title: Good Business Is Sustainable Altruism
item.description: A business model isn’t an arithmetic problem. It’s a behavioral training machine. Whatever it rewards, that’s what your company becomes.

item.title: Do Long-Term Relationships Actually Compound?
item.description: Modern culture has moralized ’long-term’ into political correctness. But time doesn’t compound by default. It only amplifies existing structure.

item.title: Reality Bends You Before You Bend Reality
item.description: Why ‘seek truth from facts’ is not about honesty, but about letting reality rewrite your beliefs

item.title: Why Smart People Fail at Social Interactions: The Value-Accessibility Balance
item.description: The smart person’s social problem isn’t being too smart—it’s not knowing when to shut up

item.title: Repetition Over Perfection: Why Showing Up Beats Talent
item.description: The real challenge isn’t doing things well. It’s doing them at all.

item.title: The Futility of Attribution
item.description: Why psychological theories don’t make you happier, and how the illusion of control creates more anxiety than ignorance ever did

item.title: Domesticated by Technology
item.description: Efficiency gains don’t create leisure because technology is selecting what kind of humans survive

item.title: Mimetic Desire and the Performance of Contrarianism
item.description: In the AI gold rush, ‘being contrarian’ has become its own consensus; the real move is choosing the life that fits you.

item.title: The Scorecard Fallacy: How Promotion Decisions Are Really Made
item.description: Your stellar performance review isn’t the key to promotion; the real secret lies in understanding the humans making the decision.

item.title: Corporates Hire by Abundance, Not by Necessity
item.description: Big-tech hiring is driven by excess, not necessity.

item.title: The Heresy of Simplicity
item.description: The best businesses make complexity invisible.

item.title: Does Proactive Design still mean anything in the world of randomness?
item.description: Great design is not about predicting the future but about crafting the antifragile system
